name: DMW Corporation
summary: DMW Corporation manufactures and sells fluid machinery in Japan and internationally. The company offers pumps, fans, blowers, and valves to governmental organizations, electric power companies, and private companies. It also manufactures and sells wastewater treatment and waste processing equipment; switchboards, electrical instrumentation control devices, and telecommunications control devices; and equipment related to dredging and dredging works. In addition, the company offers planning, designing, supervision, and installation services for various equipment; and manages and leases real estate properties. Further, it provides investment and financial service to other businesses. DMW Corporation was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
